title: Adding a Whole Number and a Proper Fraction: 3 + 2/5

steps.subgoalLabel: Check if the fraction is proper
steps.explanation: When the fraction is less than 1, the result is simply a mixed number.

steps.instruction: Write the whole number and fraction together.
steps.explanation: A whole number plus a proper fraction directly forms a mixed number.

title: Adding a Whole Number and an Improper Fraction: 4 + 7/3

steps.instruction: 7/3 is improper (7 > 3). Convert to a mixed number.
steps.explanation: When the fraction is improper, first convert it to a mixed number.
Add the whole number to the whole part of the mixed number.
